text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I don't think I've changed all that much.
I've always run for me, just because I like doing it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But I had you and everyone else who saw your
dreams in me, and called out to me, and
supported me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And that's why I'm here now.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! And I'll keep running a whole lot, just
because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So keep watching. And we can dream on
together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haven't seen you since last year's Arima, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My heart's burning. It's on fire. It has been since
the day we raced. And—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan
text_block_list.text: Oguriiiiin! You can win this! Keep on running!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm Oguri Cap. So I've got nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not worried either! I promise I'm gonna live up
to the expectations of everyone cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Ahaha, you're as tough as ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey! I could say the same about you, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I'm not planning on losing today. I am Mejiro Ryan, after all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Guess it's time for me to make a declaration too! In today's race, I'm gonna have more fun than anyone!
